---
name: Propose a new task
about: Suggest a new task for the cohort sandbox
title: "[task proposal] "
labels: ["task-proposal"]
---

## What the task should ask the student to do
A short description (2-4 sentences). What's the change? What does "done"
look like for a student?

## Why it's a useful exercise
What skill does completing this task teach? (Context engineering,
verification, decomposition, debugging, etc.)

## Suggested acceptance tests
Rough sketch of what `tests/test_task_NN.py` would assert. Bullet points
are fine.

## Suggested difficulty
Easy / Medium / Hard, and roughly which existing task it should land
next to (e.g. "between TASK_02 and TASK_03").
